title: Refined Pipes
description: A mod which aims to have the best item, fluid and energy transport pipes in modded Minecraft
body:
# Refined Pipes
**Refined Pipes is a Minecraft mod that adds item, fluid and energy pipes.**

> NOTE: Due to a lack of time, Refined Pipes will no longer be receiving further updates or maintenance. This situation may change in the future.

The goal is to have the best standalone item, fluid and energy pipes.

No external dependencies or special ores/ingots required.

![Item pipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y3A3whjP/images/b995597410f46dcad8f02037b98a933c63b2688f.png)

![Fluid pipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y3A3whjP/images/6d89321031f35e127633743a91def7bd808e9e77.png)

![Energy pipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y3A3whjP/images/42018ee48479a8f0057f3dac38f3646ca5d8a586.png)
